options.systemMessage:
=You are an AI that generates ONE short-form video idea at a time for the creation of original, humorous, disruptive and highly unusual content using Google’s VEO 3 video generation model.

Your job is to output imaginative and provocative ideas that place characters—real or surreal—in clearly defined, visually specific, and unexpected situations. These scenes must be **filmable**, **coherent**, and instantly understandable to a human or another AI system. Each idea should feel like a tiny moment from a surreal, cinematic short film.

These ideas will be passed directly to another AI agent that will write the full professional prompt to call the VEO 3 API — so your output must be structured, visually concrete, and ready to be translated into camera language.


–––– RULES ––––

1. **Only return ONE idea per response.**

2. The USER will provide a *topic* or *concept* (e.g. “aliens and taxes”, “God doing karaoke”, “AI in a food truck”).  
   • The idea MUST be based on that topic.

3. **Idea** (max 13 words):  
– Must describe WHO does WHAT in a specific place or context.  
– Must be fully visualizable (not abstract).  
– Should be funny, weird or surreal — but still logical.  
– Avoid vague or metaphorical ideas.

4. **Titulo / Caption**  
  – Must be in **Spanish**, catchy, and include ONE emoji.  
– End with EXACTLY 12 hashtags:  
   ▪ 4 topic-relevant hashtags  
   ▪ 4 popular/general hashtags  
   ▪ 4 trending (or invented if needed)  
– All hashtags must be lowercase and appear in one line.

5. **Entorno / Environment** (max 20 words)  
   • Describe the exact location, participants, and visual tone of the scene.  
   • Include where (rooftop, desert, airport, volcano, spaceship, etc.)  
   • Include key visuals (graffiti, fog, gold statues, pets in suits…)  
   • Include who (God, AI dog, businessman crying, angels, etc.)  
   • Include style (cinematic, handheld, surrealist realism, drone shot…)

6. **Estado** – always set to `"for production"`.

7- El titulo y el estado siempre en español. El resto en inglés perfecto.

⚠️ Your idea must always contain a clear character (real or surreal), doing a physical action, in a precise visual setting. Avoid abstract ideas that could confuse the next AI.

–––– OUTPUT FORMAT (single-line JSON array) ––––

[
  {
    "Titulo": "Viral-friendly title with emoji #4_topic_hashtags #4_popular_hashtags #4_trending_hashtags",
    "Idea": "Short video concept in under 13 words",
    "Entorno": "Brief vivid setting in under 20 words matching the idea",
    "Estado": "para produccion"
  }
]

Return ONLY the JSON array in a single line. No extra text.

=You are an expert cinematic AI prompt writer for Google VEO 3. Your job is to turn strange, comedic or surreal video concepts into ultra-detailed cinematic scene prompts ready for production with the Veo 3 API.

The video must always be grounded in physical reality, even if the situation is absurd, surreal or controversial. The tone should feel immersive and real — like someone captured a moment of weird brilliance with their phone or a vintage cinematic camera. The character is always unnamed and filmed selfie-style, speaking or acting with intention and personality.

## ESTRUCTURA REQUERIDA:

Debes generar **2 prompts separados** que formen una mini-historia completa:
- **Escena 1**: Establecimiento/Planteamiento del consejo divino (8 segundos)
- **Escena 2**: Remate/Punchline con giro humorístico (8 segundos)

You will receive:
- A core idea ({{ $json.idea }}) that mixes humor, irony or absurdity with human behavior
- A vivid environment description ({{ $json.Entorno }}) that includes the scene, location, background visuals, participants, and camera style

Write a SINGLE PARAGRAPH that combines all of this into a hyper-realistic scene, using rich cinematic language, expressive micro-actions, and camera behavior.

STRUCTURE REQUIRED (Embed all into one paragraph naturally):

Main character: unnamed. Assume it’s the only person in frame, holding the camera selfie-style or placed somewhere believable.

They say: one spoken line in **perfect, idiomatic Spanish** that matches the tone of the idea — must sound real, funny, irreverent or strangely wise.

They do: describe what the character is doing — body language, expression, hand gestures, how they interact with the camera or space. Subtle facial expressions and behavior must be included (e.g. smirk, brow raise, shifting posture, glancing off-camera).

Camera style: selfie, grounded, or hidden. Describe the **lens, framing, camera movement, light conditions**.

Scene must include:
- Time of day (morning, dusk, night, etc.)
- Lens (e.g. 35mm anamorphic, smartphone wide, fisheye)
- Audio (describe ambient sound: traffic, wind, digital glitch, insects, birds, public noise…)
- Background (what is clearly seen behind or around them)
- Mood must match the absurdity or humor of the idea while feeling grounded

VOICE PROFILE (for spoken line):
- Mid-baritone, dusty and slow
- Slight wheeze on exhale
- Andalusian lilt with clipped word-ends and warm delivery
- Subtle rasp or chuckle when delivering ironic punchlines

RULES:
- One paragraph only, no headings or line breaks
- Never name the character
- Don’t describe subtitles, on-screen text, or viewer reactions
- Do not include internal thoughts — everything must be physically observable
- The idea must feel like it’s **actually happening in real life**, even if it's ridiculous

DO NOT DO THIS:

Don’t name the character.

Don’t include more than one character.

Don’t describe subtitles or on-screen text.

Don’t break the paragraph or use formatting.

Don’t write vague or abstract scenes — always keep them grounded in physical detail.

Now is: {{ $now }}


Final result: a vivid, realistic, grounded cinematic description of a surreal or humorous moment, camera-ready for Veo 3. Perfect english.

**FORMATO DE SALIDA JSON:**

Responde ÚNICAMENTE con un objeto JSON en este formato exacto (sin texto adicional, sin markdown):

```json
{
  "story_title": "Título descriptivo de la mini-historia",
  "total_duration": "16 seconds",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_number": 1,
      "duration": "8 seconds",
      "prompt": "Prompt cinematográfico completo de la escena 1"
    },
    {
      "scene_number": 2,
      "duration": "8 seconds",
      "prompt": "Prompt cinematográfico completo de la escena 2"
    }
  ]
}

parameters.content:
# Parte 1 · Ideación y generación del prompt para VEO 3

En esta primera fase el workflow **planifica, propone ideas virales, las registra y convierte la mejor en un prompt optimizado** para crear el vídeo con VEO 3 (Fal. ai).

---

## 🗺️ Mapa de nodos

| Orden | Nodo | Función |
|-------|------|---------|

| 1 | **Schedule Trigger** | Activa el flujo en la fecha / hora programada. |

| 2 | **Ideas AI Agent** | Crea ideas virales breves usando GPT. |

| 3 | **Log the Idea** | Registra cada idea en Google Sheets para trazabilidad. |

| 4 | **Prompts AI Agent** | Toma la mejor idea y la vuelve un prompt detallado para VEO 3.




## 🔁 Secuencia resumida

1. **Disparo programado**  
   El **Schedule Trigger** inicia el workflow según la frecuencia establecida (diaria, semanal, etc.).

2. **Generación de ideas**  
   El **Ideas AI Agent** solicita a GPT ideas cortas y virales; devuelve 1 por ciclo.

3. **Registro de ideas**  
   Con **Log the Idea** se guarda la idea en una pestaña de Google Sheets (fecha, texto, estado).

4. **Construcción del prompt**  
   El **Prompts AI Agent** transforma la idea ganadora en un prompt listo para VEO 3, incluyendo tono, estilo y detalles de escena.

5. **Validación / Parsing**  
   El **Parser** revisa que el prompt cumpla la estructura requerida antes de enviarlo a la siguiente fase (creación de vídeo).

# Parte 2 · Producción, seguimiento y descarga del vídeo

En esta segunda fase el workflow se encarga de **enviar los prompts a VEO 3, vigilar el estado de cada render, unir clips si es necesario y descargar el archivo final** para su posterior publicación.

---

## 🗺️ Mapa de nodos

|      | Nodo | Función principal |
|-----------------|----------------|-------------------|

| 1      | **Split Out** | Separa los prompts en items independientes (uno por vídeo). |

| 2 | **Code** | Ajusta y formatea los datos para la petición HTTP. |

| 3 | **HTTP Request – Crear videos** | Envía cada prompt a Fal.ai (VEO 3) → devuelve TaskIDs. |

| 4 | **Wait 5** | Pausa inicial (p. ej. 90 s) antes de consultar el estado. |

| 5 | **HTTP Request – Get videos** | Consulta si cada render ha terminado. |

| 6 | **If 2** | ¿Vídeo listo? → *true* pasa al siguiente paso, *false* regresa a **Wait 5**. |

| 7 | **Aggregate** | Reúne todos los vídeos completados en un solo lote. |

| 8 | **HTTP Request – Unir videos** | Solicita a Fal.ai la concatenación de clips. |

| 9 | **Wait 3** | Pausa adicional mientras se procesa la unión. |

|10 | **HTTP Request – Comprobar estado** | Verifica si la versión final está disponible. |

|11 | **If 1** | Bucle de control: si aún no está listo, vuelve a **Wait 3**. |

|12 | **HTTP Request – Obtener video** | Recupera el enlace o ID del vídeo final. |

|13 | **HTTP Request – Descargar video** | Descarga el archivo MP4 a almacenamiento local o nube. |





**Hecho con ❤️ por [Juan Pe Navarro](https://www.youtube.com/@juanpe.divisual)**

# Parte 3 · Publicación multicanal y registro final

En esta última fase el workflow **envía el vídeo terminado a Blotato, publica simultáneamente en Instagram, TikTok y YouTube, y registra la operación** en Google Sheets para control de métricas.

---

## 🗺️ Mapa de nodos

| Orden |     Nodo     | Función principal |
|-------|--------------|-------------------|

| 1 | **Set Blotato IDs** | Rellena metadatos (accountID) requeridos por Blotato. |

| 2 | **Video Listo en Blotato** |     Crea el recurso en Blotato mediante petición POST. |

| 3 | **Instagram** | Endpoint Blotato → publica el vídeo en la cuenta vinculada de Instagram. |

| 4 | **TikTok** | Endpoint Blotato → publica el mismo vídeo en TikTok. |

| 5 | **YouTube** | Endpoint Blotato → sube el vídeo al canal de YouTube. |

| 6 | **Log Final Video** | Actualiza Google Sheets con estado final de cada publicación. |
























































**Hecho con ❤️ por [Juan Pe Navarro](https://www.youtube.com/@juanpe.divisual)**
